title: 9 Herbal Tinctures to Alleviate Erectile Dysfunction in Older Men
description: Ginkgo biloba tinctures have been suggested as a potential remedy for erectile dysfunction (ED) due to their unique properties and constituents. The tincture is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which are known to improve blood flow and relax blood vessels. This increase in blood flow can help to address ED by allowing more blood to reach the penis, resulting in improved erections.
